overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a cyberpunk-style video game, walking through a futuristic indoor commercial arcade with neon signage and digital billboards. The player character navigates through covered walkways, ascends staircases, and approaches a large plaza with a massive holographic CIRRUS COLA advertisement.

agents.ego_description: walking through covered arcade following a pedestrian with red hair

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with red hair walking ahead of ego through the arcade

entered.detail: concrete ceiling with fluorescent tube lighting and exposed beams
illuminated cyan sign with Japanese characters hanging from ceiling
food service counter with display cases and warm lighting
yellow safety guidelines painted on the floor

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a covered commercial arcade with neon lighting and food stalls. The camera follows a pedestrian with red hair walking ahead, passing concrete pillars and illuminated signage. The environment features a polished tile floor with yellow safety stripes.

scene_state.functional_zone: side corridor with brutalist concrete stairwell

events.description: turns left from main corridor into narrower side passage with concrete walls
begins ascending concrete stairs toward upper mezzanine level

agents.ego_description: turning left into side corridor and ascending stairs to upper level

notable_agents.action: person in green jacket and red pants standing near stairwell entrance

entered.detail: brutalist concrete staircase with geometric angles and heavy pillars
large angled digital billboard displaying advertisements on ceiling

segments.scene_description: The camera turns left from the main arcade into a narrower corridor with brutalist concrete architecture. A person in a green jacket stands near the entrance as the camera begins ascending a concrete stairwell with overhead digital screens.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper mezzanine with overhead digital billboards

events.description: emerges from stairwell into open mezzanine area with angled ceiling screens

agents.ego_description: walking through mezzanine level passing various pedestrians and advertisements

notable_agents.action: person in yellow jacket talking on phone while walking ahead

entered.detail: multiple large digital screens mounted at angles on the ceiling showing DTF advertisements
large illuminated advertisement for ALL FOODS with clown mascot
large potted palm trees in concrete planters

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the stairwell, the scene opens into a wider mezzanine with angled digital billboards overhead. The camera passes an ALL FOODS advertisement and potted trees while following a person in a yellow jacket who is talking on a phone.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand staircase with pink neon lighting

events.description: lighting shifts to pink and purple neon as ego approaches grand staircase
ascending wide staircase with illuminated pink edges and neon accents

agents.ego_description: climbing stairs toward upper plaza level passing a security guard

notable_agents.action: security guard with reflective vest and helmet standing near stairs

entered.detail: wide concrete staircase with pink illuminated edges and teal neon strips
large wall-mounted advertisements for CIRRUS COLA beverage
small checkpoint booth with green neon lighting

segments.scene_description: The environment transitions to a grand staircase with dramatic pink and purple neon lighting. The camera ascends past a security guard in a reflective vest and CIRRUS COLA wall advertisements, heading toward an upper plaza entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: large plaza with massive holographic billboard

events.description: enters large open plaza with massive curved CIRRUS COLA advertisement screen

agents.ego_description: approaching group of people standing before the large advertisement display

notable_agents.action: group of three people standing and observing the large billboard display

entered.detail: enormous curved digital screen displaying CIRRUS COLA advertisement with car interior scene
black grand piano positioned on circular platform
white illuminated concentric rings on dark polished floor

segments.scene_description: The final segment opens into a spacious plaza dominated by a massive curved CIRRUS COLA billboard. The camera approaches a group of three people standing near a grand piano on a circular illuminated platform, with the reflective floor mirroring the bright advertisement above.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a neon-lit commercial arcade that gradually ascends into a grand, holographic plaza. It begins by following a red-haired pedestrian past food stalls and concrete pillars across a polished tile floor marked with yellow safety stripes. As the camera turns left, the environment shifts into a narrow brutalist corridor where it ascends a concrete stairwell beneath glowing digital screens. The scene then opens onto a wider mezzanine filled with angled billboards and potted trees before transitioning onto a grand staircase bathed in dramatic pink and purple neon light. Finally, the camera emerges into a spacious plaza dominated by a massive curved Cirrus Cola billboard, approaching a group of people gathered around a grand piano on a reflective, illuminated platform.
